classification.description: Deed of admission to a composite guarantee and debenture dated 10 january 1997 and

particulars.description: By way of continuing security in respect of the bank liabilities any sum or sums standing to the credit of any one or more accounts of the company with the bank existing at the time of exercise by the bank of its rights of set-off under clause 14 of the composite guarantee and debenture dated 10/1/1997 (whether subject to notice or restriction on availability or not and whether denominated in sterling or in a foreign currency).

secured_details.description: All monies and liabilities due or to become due to the chargee by the company and any existing company or other further company (as defined in the deed) and as at 16 december 2003 being wilcox & co (limousines) limited, eagle specialist vehicles limited, hampshire memorials limited, a & w goddard limited, g m luff & partners limited, p boast & son limited, holmes & daughters limited and ford mears & partners limited on any account whatsoever (except any moneys or liabilities due or to become due by such existing company or other further company as guarantor for the further company concerned)

particulars.description: By way of continuing security in respect of the bank liabilities any sum or sums standing to the credit of any one or more accounts of the company with the bank existing at the time of exercise by the bank of its rights of set-off under clause 14 of the composite guarantee and debenture dated 10/1/1997 (whether subject to notice or restriction on availability or not and whether denominated in sterling or in a foreign currency).

secured_details.description: All monies and liabilities due or to become due to the chargee by the company and any existing company or other further company (as defined in the deed) and as at 4 october 1999 being wilcox & co (limousines) limited, eagle specialist vehicles limited, hampshire memorials limited, a & w goddard limited, g m luff & partners limited and p boast & son limited on any account whatsoever (except any moneys or liabilities due or to become due by such existing company or other further company as guarantor for the further company concerned)

particulars.description: And all revenues rights and benefits. Undertaking and all property and assets. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charges over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future including goodwill bookdebts uncalled capital buildings fixtures fixed plant and machinery. See the mortgage charge document for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company and/or all or any of the other companies named therein to the chargee on any account whatsoever
